name: GBT Technologies Inc.
summary: GBT Technologies Inc. (GTCH), incorporated in Nevada in 2009, develops IoT and AI-enabled networking and tracking technologies through its 50% subsidiary GBT Tokenize Corp. Products and services include wireless mesh network platforms, intelligent human body vitals devices, asset-tracking IoT, RF-based computer vision systems for 2D/3D imaging, IT consulting services, technology licensing, and e-commerce sales of electronic products.
